items.detail: 1469 total units in mission (threshold: 1200). Even late-activated units consume memory.
794 trigger zones (threshold: 90). Zones used in triggers are evaluated every frame.
CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.

7,669 non-blank lines of mission-specific Lua (frameworks excluded): foothold pg nya.lua (4,550), WelcomeMessage.lua (1,376), EWRS.lua (968), Hercules_Cargo.lua (656), Zeus.lua (87), gm_bench.lua (32). Threshold: warning >5,000, critical >15,000.
